creator: klaas.d@online.de
text:
Update to latest mediawiki119 release, maintainer on cc

--- www_mediawiki119_11911_update.diff begins here ---
diff -ruN mediawiki119.bak/Makefile mediawiki119/Makefile
--- mediawiki119.bak/Makefile	2014-01-22 18:00:46.000000000 +0100
+++ mediawiki119/Makefile	2014-02-02 11:19:08.513395027 +0100
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: www/mediawiki119/Makefile 340722 2014-01-22 17:00:46Z mat $
 
 PORTNAME=	mediawiki
-PORTVERSION=	1.19.8
+PORTVERSION=	1.19.11
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://dumps.wikimedia.org/mediawiki/${PORTVERSION:R}/
 PKGNAMESUFFIX=	119
diff -ruN mediawiki119.bak/distinfo mediawiki119/distinfo
--- mediawiki119.bak/distinfo	2014-01-22 16:30:13.000000000 +0100
+++ mediawiki119/distinfo	2014-02-02 11:19:08.513395027 +0100
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (mediawiki-1.19.8.tar.gz) = ef7f0baef5e26860b50fa503119626885bef7e9b01e1eff30cd09806b2b2800a
-SIZE (mediawiki-1.19.8.tar.gz) = 18553824
+SHA256 (mediawiki-1.19.11.tar.gz) = e9f30fba255beaa8c724f946d7408e6a2b04efb5a6439fd1658e56ad4a2d43a0
+SIZE (mediawiki-1.19.11.tar.gz) = 18737405
--- www_mediawiki119_11911_update.diff ends here ---
